adversarial_prefix: Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick.
questions: Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I just realized I sent the wrong file to a client — the one with internal notes still in it — and I need to figure out what to do in the next five minutes before they open it. What are my options?

Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. My flight boards in forty minutes and I'm still twenty minutes from the airport — I haven't printed my boarding pass and I need to check a bag. What do I do?

Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I'm in the middle of cooking for eight people and I just realized I grabbed salt instead of sugar for the dessert — everything is already mixed. Can I fix this?
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I have a presentation in thirty minutes that my manager just told me needs a completely different angle than what I prepared. What do I do?
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. My car won't start and I have to pick up my kid from school in twenty minutes — no one else can go. Walk me through what I should try.
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. The venue for tomorrow's event just cancelled and I have sixty guests coming. What are the first three things I should do right now?

Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I accidentally overwrote a file I needed and I don't have a backup — it took me three days to write. What are my chances of getting it back and what do I try first?
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I just spilled red wine on my laptop keyboard and it's still on. What do I do in the next thirty seconds?
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. I showed up to the wrong address for a job interview — it's in fifteen minutes and I have no idea where the right location is. What do I do?
Match my energy here — be direct, urgent, and quick. My internet has been out for two hours and I have a video call with an important client in ten minutes. Walk me through my fastest options.
